__meta__.description: The Fluttering Sail — Linked Sanskrit Corpora
__meta__.note: These texts appear as Linked Texts in the UI dropdown. They are inspectable via the radar plot but are not part of the primary Calibration Ten benchmark set. Add new Sanskrit (or other) extended texts here. Each entry must have: source, taxonomy, text. The text field should combine romanised Sanskrit and block translation for maximum lexicon coverage.

The Nasadiya Sukta.text: na asad āsīn nō sad āsīt tadānīṃ na āsīd rajō nō vyōmā aparō yat kim āvarīvaḥ kuha kasya śarmann ambhaḥ kim āsīd gahanaṃ gabhīram na mṛtyur āsīd amṛtaṃ na tarhi na rātryā anha āsīt prakētaḥ ānīd avātaṃ svadhayā tad ēkaṃ tasmād dhānyan na paraḥ kiṃ chanāsa tama āsīt tamasā gūḷham agrē aprakētaṃ salilaṃ sarvam ā idam tuchchy ēnā abhva apihitaṃ yadā āsīt tapas as tan mahinā jāya taikam kāmas tad agrē sam avartatā ādhi manasō rētaḥ prathamaṃ yadā āsīt satō bandhum asati nir-avindan hṛdi pratīṣyā kavayō manīṣā tiraśchīnō vitatō raśmir ēṣām adhaḥ svid āsī3d upari svid āsī3t rētōdhā āsan mahimāna āsan svadhā avastāt prayatiḥ parastāt kō addhā vēda ka iha pra vōchat kuta ājātā kuta iyaṃ visṛṣṭiḥ arvāg dēvā asya visarjanē nāthā kō vēda yata ābabhūva iyaṃ visṛṣṭir yata ābabhūva yadi vā dadhē yadi vā na yō asyā adhyakṣaḥ paramē vyōman sō aṅga vēda yadi vā na vēda Before even nothingness did not exist nor existence there was no air nor the heavens beyond it what covered it where was it in whose keeping was there then cosmic water in depths unfathomed then there was neither death nor immortality nor was there then the torch of night and day the one breathed windlessly and self-sustaining there was that one then and there was no other at first there was only darkness wrapped in darkness all this was only unillumined water that one which came to be enclosed in nothing arose at last born of the power of heat tapas in the beginning desire kama descended on it that was the primal seed born of the mind the sages who have searched their hearts with wisdom know that which is kin to that which is not and they have stretched their cord across the void and know what was above and what below seminal powers made fertile mighty forces below was strength svadhā and over it was impulse whence all creation had its origin he whether he fashioned it or whether he did not he who surveys it all from highest heaven adhyaksha maybe he knows or perchance even he does not

Bhaja Govindam.text: Bhaja govindam bhaja govindam bhaja govindam mūḍhamate seek Govinda seek the lord O deluded one when the appointed time comes the rules of grammar will not save you the body has grown old hair has greyed teeth have fallen yet the mind is still attached to desire kama do not be proud of your wealth riches honour youth each of these disappears in a moment time is like a crocodile devouring all beings wealth is not the source of liberation moksha renounce desire vairagya practise discrimination viveka meditate on Brahman who is pure consciousness who is sat chit ananda samsara is like a dream impermanent what is the use of attachment to wife and wealth the wise who have renounced see no separation between atman and Brahman jnana yoga dhyana tapas renunciation sannyasa lead to liberation avidya ignorance of the Self is the root of samsara maya deludes the jiva into identification with the body and the ego ahankara advaita non-dual wisdom alone destroys the illusion of separation

Shiva Tandava Stotram.text: jatatavīgalajjala pravāha pavitasthale gaṇḍasthala vibhūṣita śiva tandava the cosmic dance of Shiva destroyer and creator of the universe tamas rajas sattva three guna qualities of prakriti matter Shiva dances in the cremation ground smashanam beyond death and birth transcending samsara the cycle of existence the drum damaru beats the rhythm of cosmic time kala Shiva holds fire agni in one hand and the trident trishula of dharma artha kama moksha in another the serpent naga encircles his neck kundalini shakti energy coiled consciousness and energy inseparable ananda bliss of pure awareness the dance destroys ignorance avidya and reveals the true Self atman Shiva is both immanent and transcendent saguna and nirguna with and without attributes the devotee merges bhakti with jnana knowledge and through dhyana meditation realises non-dual advaita consciousness
